# Installing Python

We install Python from the official website and verify the installation in the terminal. Download Python at [python.org/downloads](https://www.python.org/downloads/).

::: {.callout-note}
If you already have Python installed on your computer — for example through Anaconda — you do not need to reinstall it. Skip ahead to video 1.3 and make sure Positron can find your existing installation.
:::

{{< video https://vimeo.com/1204855821/5e9998ea51?share=copy&fl=sv&fe=ci >}}

```python
# Run commands in the terminal to check python installation
#   On Windows: open Powershell
#   On Mac: open Terminal

python --version  # alternatively: python3 --version
pip --version     # alternatively: pip3 --version
```
